> >Description:
> /work/proftpd-1.2.0pre3/modules/mod_unixpw.c don't compile becouse undefined KTEXT. 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> cd /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd; make
> >Fix:
> include <krb.h> in ./work/proftpd-1.2.0pre3/modules/mod_unixpw.c

Not everyone installs kerberos on their computer.  Could you send me
the original compile error so I can see where this was happening?
Also, send me the results of 'ident /usr/ports/ftp/proftpd/Makefile'

Thanks,

Michael
